commands.summary: Browser opened http://127.0.0.1:3002/#tau, drew a bbox, clicked Write receipt, rendered receiptEndpointAttached=true, and verified the returned receipt path exists.

proves: The Tau annotation modal can submit a browser-created annotation draft to /api/tau/annotations.
The endpoint returns a receipt path and the browser renders receiptEndpointAttached=true.
The returned receipt path exists on disk with schema tau.watch_annotation_receipt.v1.
Invalid empty annotation boxes fail closed with HTTP 400 in route tests.
does_not_prove: A production TUI implementation beyond the existing receipt terminal proof.
